Uses of Interface
org.arakhne.neteditor.formalism.View

  • Packages that use View 
    Package Description
    org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor

    • Uses of View in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.anchor that implement View 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractEllipsoidAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for all the anchor figures based on ellipsoid.
      class  AbstractRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for all the rectangular or squared anchor figures.
      class  AnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This is the anchor that permit to connect EdgeFigure and NodeFigure.
      class  InvisibleCircleAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a circle frame.
      class  InvisibleEllipsoidAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a ellipsoid frame.
      class  InvisibleRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a rectangle frame.
      class  InvisibleRoundRectangularAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a round rectangle frame.
      class  InvisibleSquareAnchorFigure<A extends Anchor<?,?,?,?>>
      This figure is for an anchor that is not drawn in its inactive state, and the activated side of the anchor is drawn along a square frame.

    • Uses of View in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure

      Subinterfaces of View in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      interface  ModelObjectFigure<M extends ModelObject>
      This interface represents the model element figures.
      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure that implement View 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  AbstractModelObjectFigure<M extends ModelObject>
      This class is the base class for graphical representation of model elements.

    • Uses of View in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.edge that implement View 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  EdgeFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>>
      Abstract Figure classe for representing edges between nodes' ports.
      class  PolylineEdgeFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>>
      Edge that is drawn with a polyline.
      class  SegmentEdgeFigure<E extends Edge<?,?,?,?>>
      Edge that is drawn with a single segment.

    • Uses of View in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.node

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fig.figure.node that implement View 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  BitmapNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a bitmap.
      class  CircleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a circle.
      class  EllipseNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying an ellipse.
      class  NodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Abstract class to present a node in a diagram.
      class  RectangleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a rectangle.
      class  RoundRectangleNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a round rectangle.
      class  SquareNodeFigure<N extends Node<?,? super N,? super A,?>,A extends Anchor<?,? super N,? super A,?>>
      Node figure that is displaying a square.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      View ViewBinding.replaceView(UUID from, UUID to)
      Move all the view components from a view to an other one.

      Replies the views in the bindings.

      void ViewBinding.bind(UUID viewUUID, View view)
      Bind a view.

    • Uses of View in org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.figures

      Classes in org.arakhne.neteditor.fsm.figures that implement View 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  FSMEndPointFigure
      Figure for the end points of the FSM.
      class  FSMStartPointFigure
      Figure for the start points of the FSM.
      class  FSMStateFigure
      Figure for the nodes of the FSM.
      class  FSMTransitionFigure
      Figure for the transitions of the FSM.
